name: cc-monitor
description: Local monitor for Claude Code API traffic, logs, prompts, and tools

scripts.check: node --check bin/cc-monitor.js && node --check src/cli/service.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/config/target-discovery.js && node --check src/proxy/config.js && node --check src/proxy/server.js && node --check src/visualizer/server.js && node --check src/extractor/index.js && node --check src/extractor/cli.js
